project.name: Drone VLA Training
project.goal: Train a Vision-Language-Action model to take drone commands and find objects

drone.control: RC controller (2.4GHz radio, not capturable via WiFi)

network.note: Drone creates its own WiFi hotspot, no internet when connected

protocol.note: Protocol based on similar cheap WiFi drones — needs verification via packet capture with TYH Fly app

status.wifi_connection: confirmed — Mac connects to drone WiFi, loses internet
status.packet_capture: no drone command packets seen yet — need TYH Fly app running to generate traffic
next_steps: Connect phone to drone WiFi and open TYH Fly app
Run capture_drone.py to sniff actual drone packets
Build data pipeline: commands + video frames for VLA training
